subcodes.title: Words to three Baptist missionaries, spoken on 1913-06-27
subcodes.first_line: The title of the Son is not as great as the title of the Word, because in the Old Testament all the Israelitish people are called sons of God
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @Muhammad; Islam, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @oneness; unity of religion, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
